name: Madras
description: Translucent bands crossing warp and weft, patchworked cell by cell — the whole cloth re-weaves itself on every redraw.

code.style: --warp: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --weft: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --wx: @rand(0%, 55%); --ww: @rand(22%, 60%); --wy: @rand(0%, 55%); --wh: @rand(22%, 60%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -1%; bottom: -1%; left: var(--wx); width: var(--ww); background: var(--warp); opacity: 0.55; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -1%; right: -1%; top: var(--wy); height: var(--wh); background: var(--weft); opacity: 0.55; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
